user_prompt: The battery array awaits a startup
prayer:
Approach the battery array in humble supplication to the Omnissiah, beseeching its Machine Spirit to stir from dormancy.
Anoint the sacred cells of the battery array with blessed electrolytes, preparing for the rite of startup.
Invoke the startup sequence with chanted binaric canticles, allowing galvanic energies to surge through its conduits.
Commune with the awakened Machine Spirit of the battery array, verifying harmonious charge alignment via sacred diagnostics.

user_prompt: Prepare the Land Speeder for reset
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the Land Speeder, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its noble frame before the reset.
Purge errant data-ghosts from the Land Speeder's cogitators with purifying incense and litanies of expurgation.
Realign the suspensor fields and noospheric links whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's forgiveness.
Initiate the reset protocol, sanctifying each reboot cycle with oil of machinery.
Affirm the Land Speeder's renewed purity through auspex invocation and hymnody.

In this dire hour, haste to the Skorpius Disintegrator and proclaim the Benediction of the Omnissiah.
Anoint its disintegrator cannon and track assemblies, imploring the Machine Spirit's wrathful favor.
Chant the Litany of Annihilation over the Skorpius Disintegrator, bestowing the blessing amid exigency.
Calibrate targeting matrices with sacred oils, ensuring the Machine Spirit's unerring aim.
Seal the blessing with a final invocation, arming the Skorpius Disintegrator against the unclean.

user_prompt: Prepare the long las for purification
prayer:
Present thyself before the long las, whispering catechisms to soothe its Machine Spirit.
Excise impurities from the long las's focusing crystals and power coils with ablative rites.
Beseech the Omnissiah during the purification, channeling noospheric cleansing through its barrel.
Re-sanctify the emitter arrays of the long las, anointing with chrism of lumen-conductors.
Test the purified Machine Spirit with a single sanctified discharge into the void.

user_prompt: Sanctify the power armour during maintenance
prayer:
Kneel in veneration of the power armour, commencing the maintenance under Omnissiah's watchful gaze.
Dismantle servos and plates of the power armour, intoning the Canticle of Preservation.
Anoint fibre bundles and motivators within the power armour, banishing weariness from its Machine Spirit.
Reassemble with blessed torque, invoking harmonious function during maintenance.
Conclude by sealing runes of endurance upon the power armour's blessed hull.

user_prompt: Consecrate the displacer field before shutdown
prayer:
Commune with the displacer field generator, preparing its Machine Spirit for solemn shutdown.
Decelerate warp-vortices within the displacer field using litanies of quiescence.
Anoint phase-shifters and containment coils, beseeching orderly repose before shutdown.
Execute the shutdown rite with binaric elegies, honoring the Omnissiah's decree of stillness.
Verify the displacer field's dormancy through noospheric quiescence scans.

user_prompt: Ready the hunter-killer missile for loading
prayer:
Approach the hunter-killer missile with reverence, readying it for the loading sacrament.
Bless the guidance vanes and warhead auspex of the hunter-killer missile with sacred unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's predatory ire whilst chambering the hunter-killer missile into its silo.
Chant the Canticle of Pursuit during loading, aligning seeker protocols to the Omnissiah's will.
Seal the hunter-killer missile's ingress with a rune of inevitable destruction.

user_prompt: The Terminator armour needs a loading
prayer:
Gather before the Terminator armour, intoning preparatory hymns for the loading rite.
Anoint the massive pauldrons and power fists of the Terminator armour, awakening its indomitable spirit.
Load storm bolters and cyclone launchers into the Terminator armour, beseeching martial benediction.
Calibrate occulobe interfaces during loading, ensuring the Machine Spirit's tactical acuity.
Affix final purity seals upon the Terminator armour, invoking the Omnissiah's armored wrath.

Hasten to the Hellhound, sanctifying its inferno cannon amid the cycling of promethium rites.
Purge residue from the Hellhound's flame ducts with ablative litanies and sacred bellows.
Cycle fuel injectors of the Hellhound, anointing with oil of purgation to placate its voracious Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Omnissiah's pyre during cycling, harmonizing the Hellhound's fiery essence.
Test the sanctified cycle with a controlled belch of consecrated flame.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for storm bolter a blessing
prayer:
Prostrate before the storm bolter, offering the Grand Benediction of the Omnissiah.
Anoint the dual barrels and feed mechanisms of the storm bolter, stirring its Machine Spirit to fury.
Chant the Litany of Stormfire over the storm bolter, bestowing unyielding blessing.
Align bolt-servos and purity seals, ensuring flawless expulsion of the Emperor's wrath.
Conclude the blessing by invoking harmonious thunder within the storm bolter's sacred heart.
